mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.wishlist_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, wishlist_item_id, user_id, product_id, variant_id, product_name, brand, sku, image_url, category_name, added_at, price_when_added, current_price, notify_on_price_drop, available_quantity, stock_status, notes, created_time ) SELECT w.id, 'homebase', NOW(), w.id, w.user_id, w.product_id, w.variant_id, COALESCE(p.name, ''), p.brand, pv.sku, COALESCE(vma.cdn_url, vma.original_url, pma.cdn_url, pma.original_url), cat.name, w.added_at, w.price_when_added, COALESCE(pv.selling_price, p.base_price, w.price_when_added), w.notify_on_price_drop, COALESCE(inv.available_quantity, 0), COALESCE(inv.status, 'UNKNOWN'), w.notes, w.created_time FROM hm_wishlist.wishlist_items w LEFT JOIN hm_product.products p ON p.id = w.product_id LEFT JOIN hm_product.categories cat ON cat.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN hm_product.product_variants pv ON pv.id = w.variant_id LEFT JOIN hm_product.variant_media vm ON vm.variant_id = w.variant_id AND vm.is_primary = true LEFT JOIN hm_product.media_assets vma ON vma.id = vm.asset_id LEFT JOIN hm_product.product_media pm ON pm.product_id = w.product_id AND pm.is_primary = true LEFT JOIN hm_product.media_assets pma ON pma.id = pm.asset_id LEFT JOIN hm_inventory.inventory_item inv ON inv.variant_id = w.variant_id
